CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Appearances:
Harold Justman, Esq. for Plaintiff; Lisa Chin also present as witness, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant.
Principal of $268,136.43
Attorney's fees of $1,900.00
Costs of $289.00
For the total of $270,325.43.
Judgment signed in open court.
